HGSS.060.0000:
Only one Pokémon can Stroll with you
in a Pokéwalker...\f
I can’t decide which one!
HGSS.060.0001:
I may not look like it, but I have
many Pokéwalkers on me!\r
They make loud noises as I walk.\f
Maybe taking a Stroll isn’t as easy as
I thought...
HGSS.060.0002:
Pay attention, please!\f
...Oops, I have to quit thinking like
a teacher all the time.\f
You must be a Pokémon Trainer.\f
Since you’re working so hard,
I want you to have this.\f
HGSS.060.0004:
Let a Pokémon hold that Quick Claw.\f
Sometimes it will strike first
during battle.
HGSS.060.0005:
It’s fun having a Pokémon out of its
Poké Ball to walk with it,\r
but the Pokéwalker is a whole\r
new dimension.
HGSS.060.0006:
My mom can’t take my Pokémon and tells
me not to play with it indoors.\r
But, hey!\f
I can keep it in my Pokéwalker.
That way, I’m always with it!
HGSS.060.0007:
I take walks in the park, but I
never go into the grass.\f
Trainers always want to battle...
HGSS.060.0009:
Huff, puff, huff...\f
I am...out of...breath!
I’ve been running to try\r
and charge the Pokéwalker!
HGSS.060.0022:
Relaxation Square for Everyone
National Park
HGSS.060.0023:
What is this notice?\f
Please battle only in the park grass.\f
           National Park
           Warden’s Office
HGSS.060.0024:
What is this notice?\f
No ball playing allowed
other than Poké Balls.\f
           National Park
           Warden’s Office
HGSS.060.0042:
Please join us in the next
Bug-Catching Contest, too!
HGSS.060.0045:
Don: Whether you get the right Pokémon
or not is half luck.
HGSS.060.0048:
Ed: The size of the Pokémon is not the
only thing to compare when trying to\r
decide the winner.
HGSS.060.0051:
Abby: Somebody told me that colorful
Pokémon are more likely to win.\r
I wonder if it’s true...
HGSS.060.0054:
William: I got the Pokémon I wanted,
so I’m very happy.
HGSS.060.0057:
Benny: You know what?
I caught a SCYTHER the other day,\r
and I still didn’t win...
HGSS.060.0060:
Barry: You have a better chance to win
when your Pokémon is at a high level.\r
But it seems that there is more\r
to winning.
HGSS.060.0063:
Cindy: I love Bug-type Pokémon.\f
Am I repeating myself?
HGSS.060.0066:
Josh: Somebody won the Contest
with a CATERPIE!
HGSS.060.0069:
Samuel: Arrgh! I though it would
score higher.
HGSS.060.0072:
Kipp: Studying hard on Bug-type
Pokémon doesn’t ensure you’ll win here.
HGSS.060.0084:
Bugsy: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
We have a Bug-Catching Contest\r
tomorrow!\f
I have won the Contest many
times, so I won’t participate.\f
But you should try it.\r
I’m sure you can win!
HGSS.060.0085:
Bugsy: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
We have a Bug-Catching Contest\r
tomorrow!\f
I have won the Contest many
times, so I won’t participate.\f
But you should try it.
I’m sure you can win!\f
By the way, will you take a
picture with me? [0200,0000]
HGSS.060.0086:
Bugsy: OK! Let’s take one.
Smile!\f
HGSS.060.0087: Bugsy: Yay! This is a good one!
HGSS.060.0088:
Bugsy: Oh, I see...
That’s OK. I’m not sad.
HGSS.060.0089:
Your Photo Album is full.\f
Access your PC and delete
some pictures.
